title: Issue catalog (webview / VSIX “nothing loads”) — traceability to evals
description: Formal task for dev/WEBVIEW_NON_LOADING_RUNBOOK.md: each catalog row maps to success criteria and automated checks where possible. Runtime-only items (open a folder, add crystalcontext_config.md, fix YAML by hand) stay manual; host code paths and packaging are gated by evals.
success_criteria: Runbook dev/WEBVIEW_NON_LOADING_RUNBOOK.md exists with the full 1–11 table
1 — Webview signals ready synchronously with idempotent guard (embedded webview event timing)
2–3 — Stale dist/VSIX prevented: main→dist, build+test+package in release loop (vsix_freshness_eval, webview_reliability rel_dist)
4 — Host posts noWorkspace when Local scope has no workspace (static: message path in extension.js; integration: extension-test)
5 — Host posts noFile when config file missing
6 — Host posts parseError on bad YAML
7 — webviewDiag pipeline to Output + log file
10 — No esbuild-breaking backticks in webview template comments (conservative static check + build in loop)
11 — extension-test.js in npm test with Uri/globalState/onDidChangeWorkspaceFolders mocks
Full loop (extension_eval, webview_reliability_eval, vsix_freshness_eval, issue_catalog_eval) passes
notes: Task 006 is implementation/regression prevention; 007 is catalog↔eval traceability. Rows 4–6 user actions (folder, files, YAML) cannot be fully automated here; host branches + extension-test cover the extension side.
